name: Dispersion Trading
description: Exploits the persistent overpricing of index implied volatility relative to the (weighted) average of its constituents' implied volatilities. The correlation risk premium makes index options more expensive than a basket of stock options. Sell index vol, buy individual stock vols.
core_logic: dispersion_trade = short index straddle + long basket of stock straddles. P&L = realized_dispersion - implied_dispersion. Profit when stocks move independently (correlation < implied_correlation).

risk.main_risk: Correlation spike during market crashes (positions lose both legs)

signal_buy: Implied correlation unusually high → dispersion underpriced → buy dispersion
signal_sell: Implied correlation unusually low → dispersion overpriced → sell dispersion
